_doc: === TUNED PROMPT: Domain-adapted extraction guidelines for LLM ingestion ===
prompt_text: When extracting from this intelligence narrative, pay special attention to: temporal precision of meetings, participant roles (handler/asset/courier), information asymmetries between parties, and chain-of-custody for documents.
_prompt_text: The domain-specific extraction guidelines appended to the system prompt during ingestion.
domain_description: Intelligence investigation with document exchanges and surveillance
_entity_types: Entity types the tuner identified as relevant to this domain.
